name: rvv-binary-family-registry-owner
title: Promote RVV binary family ownership out of i32 legacy registry
creator: codex
notes: Completed one coherent compiler refactor round. Added RVV-owned binary family registry for i32-vadd, i32-vsub, i32-vmul, and i64-vadd; removed RVVBinaryDescriptor.h dependency on I32BinaryFamilyRegistry.h; updated frontend lowering, RVV plugin, RVV target export/microkernel paths, and tests to consume descriptor-owned route/ABI/intrinsic/shape metadata. Full check-tianchenrv passed 179/179. No ssh rvv evidence was needed because this was a structural ownership refactor with no new runtime claim.
